name: NextGen Indoor Golf
address: 1671 Hoffman Rd Ste 70, Green Bay, WI 54311
about: NextGen Indoor Golf is a state-of-the-art golf facility offering an indoor golf experience using TrackMan 4 technology. The venue is designed for golfers of all levels to improve their game with professional lessons, club fittings, and simulator play. It features a full bar and kitchen, making it suitable for casual play, practice sessions, and social events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan 4 technology for precise shot tracking
Professional coaching and custom club fitting services
Full bar and kitchen amenities for a complete experience
4 simulators available for play and events
Immersive virtual course library with realistic rendering

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with party platters and catering options

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own golf clubs for the simulator experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full bar and kitchen on-site, and outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary depending on your pace and the number of players in your group, but it typically takes 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and suitable for families, with a welcoming atmosphere and amenities for all ages.
